name: Harvest Vegetable Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam carrots and squash for 5 minutes.
2. Add broccoli, red pepper, zucchini, and red onion; steam for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Add chickpeas; steam for 3 to 5 more minutes or until all vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. In a small saucepan, heat oil over medium heat. Cook curry powder, gingerroot, cumin, garlic, and hot pepper flakes (if using) for 2 minutes.
5. Add stock and lemon juice; simmer, uncovered, for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Toss vegetables with the sauce.
7. Serve over hot rice or couscous.
8. Sprinkle with coriander or parsley.
Serves 6.
